## What changed

Describe the focused change.

## Why

Describe the problem, impact, and root cause when applicable.

## Security and data impact

State whether this affects authentication, credentials, external actions, workspace access, sessions, retention, migration, or MCP policy.

## Validation

- [ ] `PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Documentation updated when behavior or configuration changed
- [ ] No secrets, personal data, runtime files, or private paths included
